content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 EverAI: Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor (Full Remote - Worldwide) Anywhere in the World Santa Venera All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4178/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Malta <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://everai.ai">http://everai.ai</a> </p> <h1>Our Vision &amp; Products</h1> <p><em><strong> EverAI — Building the Future of AI Companionship</strong></em></p> <p><em>One of the Top 15 Largest &amp; Fastest-Growing AI Companies in the World</em></p> <p><em>50 Million Users in 2 years — Help Us Reach 100M first, 500M next<br><br></em></p> <p>At&nbsp;<strong>EverAI</strong>, we’re shaping what it means to connect with AI. With&nbsp;<strong>50 million users and counting</strong>, we're not just building products — we're creating entirely new categories.</p> <p>Our flagship product is the&nbsp;<strong>world’s largest AI companionship platform</strong>, redefining relationships for millions. It is governed by our proprietary moderation system, EverGuard — an internal AI designed to ensure everything we build is&nbsp;<strong>safe, ethical, and human-first</strong>.</p> <p><em>And we’re only just getting started!</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>Our Team</h1> <p>We are an enthusiastic, passionate and hardworking team of ≈ 75 people. Our founding team has strong entrepreneurial experience building and scaling web products from 0 to IPO.<br><br></p> <p><strong>Alexis Soulopoulos&nbsp;</strong>[CEO]</p> <p><em>• 10+ years in Tech Executive Leadership</em></p> <p><em>• Co-Founder Mad Paws Holdings (from 0 to IPO)</em></p> <p><em>• Forbes 30 under 30 + Deloitte TechFast50 ’22 &amp; ‘23</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Michael Monin</strong>&nbsp;[Co-founder &amp; CTO]</p> <p><em>• 10+ years as CTO / COO (web2/web3), 1+ year in AI/LLM</em></p> <p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue) and Zipchat (AI Chatbot for E-commerce brands)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Thomas Lacroix&nbsp;</strong>[Co-founder &amp; CMO]</p> <p><em>• 8+ years in Customer Acquisition &amp; E-commerce Growth</em></p> <p><em>• Serial-entrepreneur: Curatible (sold to Blackstone) and MTK Digital (exited / 0-&gt;$20m revenue)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Maruša Fasano&nbsp;</strong>[CFO/Legal]</p> <p><em>• 25+ years in Finance, Strategy, M&amp;A</em></p> <p><em>• Ex-CFO/M&amp;A @Curatible (exited to Blackstone)</em></p> <p><em>• Ex-President of the Board @SotremoSA (exited)</em></p> <p><em>• Co-founder/CFO @SoftOne (exited)</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>Your Role</h1> <p><strong>We are looking for a Mid/Senior AI Cinematic Video Editor who is deeply embedded in generative video workflows and can independently craft high-quality, narrative-driven content from concept to final output.</strong></p> <p>You are a sharp-eyed video editor comfortable operating at the intersection of creativity and emerging technology, building visually compelling longform videos using AI-first pipelines. You take ownership of the entire production stack — from prompting and generation to editing, compositing, graphic design work and final delivery. You thrive in a high-performance environment where your quick wits and passion for story-telling shine.</p> <p>Reporting to your Content Lead, this is what you'll be doing:</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h2>Key Responsibilities</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Conceptualise scripts based on current production needs and centred around existing AI characters (our own IPs)</p> </li> <li> <p>Create&nbsp;<strong>narrative-driven, longform video content</strong>, including stylized and explicit NSFW visuals, with a strong focus on storytelling, atmosphere, and visual coherence throughout</p> </li> <li> <p>Own and manage&nbsp;<strong>end-to-end AI video production workflows</strong>, from ideation and prompting to generation, editing, and post-production</p> </li> <li> <p>Work extensively with&nbsp;<strong>ComfyUI pipelines</strong>, building, customizing, and optimizing node-based workflows for image and video generation</p> </li> <li> <p>Utilize tools such as&nbsp;<strong>Stable Diffusion (AUTOMATIC1111), ComfyUI, Runway, Pika, and other AI video platforms</strong>&nbsp;to produce high-quality visual sequences</p> </li> <li> <p>Develop and maintain&nbsp;<strong>consistent character appearance, style, and scene continuity</strong>&nbsp;across longer narratives using advanced techniques</p> </li> <li> <p>Integrate&nbsp;<strong>motion graphic design and colour correction</strong>&nbsp;to deliver cohesive final outputs</p> </li> <li> <p>Experiment rapidly with new&nbsp;<strong>AI models, tools, and techniques</strong>, incorporating them into production workflows and sharing skills with the rest of the team</p> </li> <li> <p>Align with your Content Lead’s creative direction while maintaining a high degree of&nbsp;<strong>autonomy in execution and technical decision-making</strong></p> </li> <li> <p>Continuously refine workflows for&nbsp;<strong>efficiency, scalability, and output quality</strong></p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h1>Your Qualifications</h1> <h2>Hard Skills</h2> <ul> <li> <p>4–6+ years of experience in&nbsp;<strong>video production, VFX, or digital art</strong>, with a strong portfolio (AI-driven video work is a must)</p> </li> <li> <p>Proven experience with&nbsp;<strong>ComfyUI (mandatory)</strong>, including building and managing complex node-based workflows</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong proficiency in&nbsp;<strong>Stable Diffusion / AUTOMATIC1111</strong>&nbsp;and related tooling (Advanced prompting, working with trained LoRAs, refining, upscaling, inpainting etc.)</p> </li> <li> <p>Hands-on experience with the latest&nbsp;<strong>AI video tools and models</strong>&nbsp;(e.g., Kling, Seedance, Happy Horse, and similar emerging options)</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid understanding of&nbsp;<strong>AI image/video generation pipelines</strong>, including prompting, batching, consistency techniques, and post-processing</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with traditional tools like&nbsp;<strong>Premiere Pro, After Effects or similar</strong>&nbsp;for final assembly and p
